pi_items.source: setup_moodle.sh line 324: 'World History' course created with shortname='HIST201'
Verified as standard Moodle block via docs.moodle.org/501/en/Calendar_block and GitHub moodle/moodle repository. The calendar_month block is a core block included in Moodle installations.

Verified as standard Moodle blockname for HTML/Text block. Referenced in export_result.sh (line 66) querying mdl_block_instances WHERE blockname='html'. Confirmed via docs.moodle.org/501/en/Text_block and docs.moodle.org/311/en/HTML_block.
Task description line 5 specifies: 'A Text block configured with the title Course Support'. Metadata matches description requirement.

Task description line 5 specifies: 'the content Email: help@history.edu'. Metadata value is incomplete - it is missing the 'Email: ' prefix. The verifier (verifier.py line 84) checks for substring match, which would pass if the full content contains help@history.edu, but the metadata claim itself is incomplete.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures blocks in the HIST201 (World History) course, which is a synthetic course created during Moodle environment initialization with shortname HIST201. The required blocks are calendar_month and html, both verified as standard Moodle block types. The HTML block must have title 'Course Support'. The metadata claims the HTML block content is 'help@history.edu', but the task description specifies the complete content should be 'Email: help@history.edu', making the metadata value contradicted and incomplete.
